NAVAREA XIX 124/17
1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 080630 UTC SEP 17.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
72-05.2N - 019-59.1E LEIV EIRIKSSON
71-19.1N - 022-14.8E FLOATEL ENDURANCE ACP GOLIAT
65-22.2N - 007-21.3E SONGA ENCOURAGE

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
C. ACP-ADJACENT TO CHARTED PLATFORM
2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 122/17
